title: bunium rectangulum
intro: Bunium rectangulum, also known as the Rectangular Bunium or Black Lovage, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and flatulence. The health benefits of Bunium rectangulum include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate joint pain and reduce swelling. Bunium rectangulum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or dried root, which can be used to treat various gastrointestinal issues and promote overall well-being.
